column2: Automation Site Map CAA V5 Encyclopedia Automation Site Map This site map helps you find your way in the CAA V5 Automation documentation for the brand you have installed. A brand is made up of solutions. Each solution relies on the CAA foundations: 3D PLM Enterprise Architecture, that isolates the remainder of the APIs and the applications from, but altogether allows for, operating systems and other system required softwares 3D PLM PPR Hub Open Gateway, that provides both the Process, Product, and Resource modelers, and the gateways to exchange data between either other CAD systems or standard formats RADE, that supplies the tools to design, implement, build, check, test, and manage the sources of the CAA applications. A solution is made up of modelers, each of them representing the APIs of one or several products. For example, the Part Design modeler is the API part of the Part Design product.
